title: Billing discrepancy on invoice #1001
description: Customer reports a billing discrepancy on their monthly invoice. Charges appear duplicated for the premium tier.

title: Fraud detection false positive
description: Transaction flagged as potential fraud by the detection engine. Customer confirmed legitimate purchase. Need whitelist update.

title: Wire transfer reconciliation discrepancy
description: Incoming wire transfer amount does not match purchase order. Reconciliation team flagged a $1,200 variance.

title: Billing dispute - double charge
description: Customer was charged twice for same service period due to a system error. Duplicate charge must be reversed immediately.

title: Fraud loss recovery process initiated
description: Fraud investigation confirmed. Loss recovery process initiated with acquiring bank and law enforcement referral filed.

title: Billing reconciliation post-upgrade
description: Following system upgrade, billing reconciliation shows 3 new unmatched items requiring investigation and resolution.

title: AML alert post-changes review
description: AML monitoring system triggered an alert for this account following recent transaction pattern changes. Review initiated.

title: Fraud investigation follow-up
description: Follow-up investigation on previously flagged fraud case reveals additional linked transactions requiring documentation.

title: Compliance re-certification required
description: Regulatory change requires customers in this category to complete re-certification. Outreach campaign being prepared.

title: Payments settlement dispute
description: Disputed settlement amount from last week's batch identified during daily reconciliation. Correspondent bank contacted.

title: Audit evidence supplemental request
description: External auditor submitted supplemental evidence request covering 3 additional control areas not in original scope.

title: New customer onboarding KYC
description: Initial KYC check for new customer Eleanor Voss. Document collection and identity verification steps in progress.

title: Billing plan selection for new account
description: New customer selecting billing plan. Enterprise tier recommended based on projected usage. Contract under review.

title: New customer fraud pre-screening
description: Standard pre-onboarding fraud pre-screening for Marcus Webb. PEP and sanctions check clear. Device check pending.

title: Compliance initial risk rating
description: Initial compliance risk rating assignment for new customer. Based on business type and jurisdiction: medium risk category.
